channel.title: 1.1.1.1 app on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in 1.1.1.1 app on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to setup Cloudflare for Teams on 1.1.1.1 and fix WARP error.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-p5FYlQA2dDw/YexFY995GwI/AAAAAAAAIro/o_L4_bRq-_Me2Jnt4IvEkOhhEj7cF-OxwCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1642874206996806-0.png" alt=""> Cloudflare is popular global network where you can add your website and protect it from DDoS attacks, bots, malwares, viruses etc even speed up your website and make it more secure with cloudflare fast servers which are available world wide 24/7 with best uptime due to this facility majority of bloggers and developers use Cloudflare to get numerous benefits and features from Cloudflare.com However, Cloudflare technology is only limited to protecting websites, apps etc prior 2018 but after that Cloudflare created a VPN named 1.
